ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in kg */,
  "item_fat_content" TEXT /* Fat content category for the product (e.g., Low Fat, Regular) */,
  "item_visibility" REAL /* Visibility score of the product on store shelves */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum retail price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Manufacturing date of the product */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_size" TEXT /* Size category of the outlet (e.g., Small, Medium, High) */,
  "outlet_location_type" TEXT /* Location type of the outlet (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 3) */,
  "outlet_type" TEXT /* Type of the outlet (e.g., Supermarket Type1, Grocery Store) */,
  "outlet_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the outlet */,
  "outlet_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the outlet */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the outlet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being sold */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outlet where the sale occurred */,
  "item_outlet_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the product in the outlet */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_time" TEXT /* Time of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to any active promotion during the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES products ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales summary record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product for which sales are summarized */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount across all outlets for the product */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price at which the product has been sold */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Total number of sales transactions for the product */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales summary */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outlet where the sales occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES products ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product that the promotion applies to */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, buy one get one) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount offered */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is currently active */,
  "minimum_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity required to apply the promotion */,
  "maximum_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity to which the promotion applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES products ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in inventory */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outlet where the product is stocked */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product in the outlet */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level before reorder is necessary */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last reordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES products ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Manager, Staff) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
